column1: # Formal -> informal Indonesian injection map (Phase 2, lexicon-injection arm).
#   - One entry per line. Blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored.
#   - The key is matched case-insensitively on whole words (\b...\b); multi-word
#     keys (e.g. "tidak ada") are matched as a phrase and beat shorter keys.
#   - The value is a '|'-separated list of colloquial alternatives. The FIRST is
#     the default (used with --first-only); otherwise one is chosen per match by
#     a seeded RNG, so runs are reproducible but not monotonous.
# Editing:  add/remove rows freely, reorder alternatives to change the default,
# Keep swaps MEANING-PRESERVING — this set reuses the formal qrels, so a swap
# that changes the information need corrupts relevance. Risky, grammar-altering
# swaps are left commented out at the bottom; enable them only if you check intent.
# --- risky (grammar/meaning-altering): enable only after checking intent ---
